minimal_obstruction: A proof of the Yang–Mills mass gap requires a non-abelian Wilson/Hamiltonian/coercivity theorem with continuum transfer; the present script contains only a scalar torus surrogate.

missing_ingredients.name: Non-abelian operator
missing_ingredients.statement: Replace the scalar torus surrogate by an explicit non-abelian Wilson/Hamiltonian/Hessian operator on admissible gauge configurations.

missing_ingredients.name: Gauge-invariant coercivity
missing_ingredients.statement: Prove a uniform strictly positive lower bound on the physical quotient after removal of gauge zero modes.

missing_ingredients.name: Reflection positivity bridge
missing_ingredients.statement: Derive the positivity/coercivity statement from a bona fide Yang-Mills reflection positivity or transfer-matrix argument.

missing_ingredients.name: Continuum transfer
missing_ingredients.statement: Prove that the lattice lower bound survives the continuum and infinite-volume limit.

missing_ingredients.name: Mass-gap observable
missing_ingredients.statement: Identify a gauge-invariant correlator/observable whose decay is forced by the coercive lower bound.
